title: Truck-shovel vs K-Tec scraper DES
description: Discrete-event simulation workbench comparing conventional truck-shovel haulage with scraper-train alternatives on a synthetic Bushveld PGM waste-stripping push.

title: Mine reconciliation dashboard
description: Planned vs actual tonnes, dilution, and recovery variance views for short-interval control.

title: Fleet capacity MDP
description: Markov decision model for multi-unit fleet availability and throughput under maintenance uncertainty.

title: Pit schedule Gantt
description: Interactive Gantt for pushbacks, phase dependencies, and equipment constraints.

title: Closure liability Monte Carlo
description: Stochastic closure-cost bands with sensitivity to discount rate and rehabilitation scope.
